announcements.ai_summary: LTIMindtree Limited announced the expansion of its AI-led engineering platform, BlueVerseTM Tech. This expansion includes the launch of three new purpose-built platforms: AppIQ, AgentIQ, and FusionIQ. These platforms are designed to help enterprises modernize applications, manage AI-first software delivery, and engineer quality at scale. The announcement was made on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Oil India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Board Comments on fine levied by the Exchange '.
announcements.ai_summary: Oil India Limited's Board of Directors met on March 20, 2026, to discuss a fine levied by the stock exchanges for non-compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, regarding board composition for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The Board advised requesting a waiver of the fines, citing that the non-compliance was beyond the company's control.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Sterling Tools Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Sterling Tools Limited's Board of Directors met on March 23, 2026, from 10:30 AM to 01:15 PM. During the meeting, Ms. Pragya Saxena was appointed as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, designated as Key Managerial Personnel (KMP), effective March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Press Release in connection with Joint venture project ".
announcements.ai_summary: Bosch Limited and Tata AutoComp Systems Limited have announced a joint venture to accelerate future growth in e-mobility. This announcement follows their earlier joint venture agreement dated March 18, 2026. The press release regarding this joint venture was issued on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has completed the acquisition of an additional 30.58% equity stake in its subsidiary, Apollo Health and Lifestyle Limited (AHLL). The transaction involved acquiring 41,650,638 equity shares from International Finance Corporation and IFC EAF Apollo Investment Company for Rs. 12,540.68 million. Following this acquisition, Apollo Hospitals' effective shareholding in AHLL has increased to 99.42%.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited Has Informed the Exchange About Publication of Case Study and Case Reports.
announcements.ai_summary: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited has announced the publication of academic case studies and case reports in the "International Journal of Advanced Research (IJAR)". These publications, authored by medical professionals associated with the company, including its Managing Director and senior consultants, highlight the company's commitment to Ayurvedic research and evidence-based clinical practice.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bharti Airtel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Airtel brings faster speeds and wider 5G coverage to millions in Gujarat with 2,750+ new sites".
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has issued a press release announcing the deployment of over 2,750 new 5G sites across Gujarat in the last 12 months. This expansion aims to provide faster speeds, wider coverage, and an improved network experience for millions of customers in 36 districts.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Zinc Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel Partner to Scale Low-Carbon ZincSolutions with EcoZen".
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited and Tata Steel are partnering to scale low-carbon zinc solutions with a product called EcoZen. This collaboration aims to reduce value-chain emissions, as EcoZen offers over 75% lower carbon intensity than conventional zinc. The partnership builds on a long-standing relationship supporting critical infrastructure projects.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Update regarding Investment in the share capital of Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the company
announcements.ai_summary: Transrail Lighting Limited has recalled share application money remitted for its wholly-owned subsidiary, Transrail Trading LLC in the UAE. This decision was made due to the current war-like situation.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: COMPLIANCE WITH REGULATION 30 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015 - FUNDING OF  06TH SEMI ANNUAL INTEREST PAYMENT IN ESCROW ACCOUNT MAINTAINED IN BANK OF INDIA WRT MTNL BOND SERIES VII E (INE153A08147)
announcements.ai_summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Limited has funded the 6th semi-annual interest payment for its MTNL Bond Series VII E (INE153A08147) into an escrow account maintained with Bank of India. The funding was completed on March 21, 2026, for the interest payment due on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of 3,000 Non Convertible Debentures on Private Placement basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Mangal Credit and Fincorp Limited has approved the allotment of 3,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. Each NCD has a face value of INR 1,00,000 and was issued at INR 98,000.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Hari Shanker Khemka For and on behalf of Hari Khemka Business Family Trust has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Hari Shanker Khemka, on behalf of the Hari Khemka Business Family Trust, has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to a substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Urvashi Tilakdhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Urvashi Tilakdhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Akshay Dhar has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Akshay Dhar has submitted a disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This filing relates to substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "ICONiQ White Whisky Makes History: World s Fastest Growing MillionaireSpirits Brand Crosses 10 Million Cases Milestone.".
announcements.ai_summary: Allied Blenders and Distillers Limited has issued a press release announcing that its ICONiQ White Whisky has crossed the 10 million cases milestone. The brand is described as the world's fastest-growing millionaire spirits brand. The press release is dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Shalby Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Inaugurationof Oncology Department along with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital'.
announcements.ai_summary: Shalby Limited has inaugurated an Oncology Department with advanced Radiotherapy facilities at Krishna Shalby Hospital in Ahmedabad. This expansion aims to provide comprehensive, integrated cancer care under one roof. The department is equipped with advanced technology and an experienced team of oncologists for specialized diagnosis and treatment.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Gudhi Padwa sales update for the Financial Year 2025-2026.
announcements.ai_summary: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited reported a significant increase in Gudhi Padwa sales for FY 2025-2026, reaching Rs. 73.004 million. This represents a 2.51 times year-on-year growth compared to Rs. 20.818 million in the previous year's Gudhi Padwa sales.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Commencement of commercial production of 4,500 MTPA".
announcements.ai_summary: Vintage Coffee And Beverages Limited announced the commencement of commercial production for an additional 4,500 MTPA capacity on March 23, 2026. This brownfield expansion for soluble coffee is located at a wholly-owned subsidiary's facility near Rachur Village, Telangana, increasing the company's total installed production capacity.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Euro Pratik Sales Limited has informed the Exchange about Acquisition of Chawla Brothers
announcements.ai_summary: Euro Pratik Sales Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of a 51% stake in Chawla Brothers, a partnership firm based in Jalandhar and Ludhiana. The total investment for this acquisition amounts to Rs. 32.20 crore.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: IFGL Refractories Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: IFGL Refractories Limited has resumed operations at its Kandla manufacturing facility in Gujarat. The facility, located at Plot Nos. 638-644, Kandla Special Economic Zone, had been impacted by Liquified Petroleum Gas (LPG) supply issues. All product lines at the Kandla works are now functional.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: Kokuyo Camlin Limited has informed the Exchange about Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.ai_summary: Kokuyo Camlin Limited has received an order from the DS Income Tax assessment unit, National faceless unit, India. The order pertains to a demand for Income Tax along with interest and penalty, issued under sections 147/143(3) read with section 144B of the Income Tax Act, 1961. The company received this communication on March 21, 2025.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Adani Green Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Operationalization of Projects'.
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL) has operationalized an aggregate of 510.1 MW power projects at Khavda, Gujarat, through its stepdown subsidiaries. This commissioning has increased AGEL’s total operational renewable generation capacity to 17,982.3 MW. The decision to operationalize these plants and commence power generation was made on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: P N Gadgil Jewellers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Store opening'.
announcements.ai_summary: P N Gadgil Jewellers Limited has opened two new stores on March 22, 2026. One store is located at The Nextation Building, Kolhapur, Maharashtra, and the other is a Franchise Owned, Company Operated (FOCO) model store in Ghatkopar East, Mumbai. Following these openings, the company's total store count has reached 75.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jtekt India Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Jtekt India Limited has received an Assessment Order from the Office of the Income Tax Authority. The company has provided the requisite information as per Schedule III under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations. This update is for the record.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Goa Carbon Limited has informed the Exchange about the temporary shut-down of the Company's Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work.
announcements.ai_summary: Goa Carbon Limited has temporarily shut down its Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work. The unit is located at Vill. Udayabata, Paradeepgarh, Dist. Jagatsinghpur, Odisha. The shutdown commenced on March 22, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update of Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL), a listed material subsidiary of the Company'.
announcements.ai_summary: Kirloskar Industries Limited has informed the exchange about an update from its material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). KFIL, a listed entity, has filed an intimation with the stock exchanges where its shares are listed. A copy of KFIL's intimation is enclosed for reference.

announcements.subject: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.detail: RITES Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
announcements.ai_summary: RITES Limited has received a Letter of Acceptance from Research Designs and Standards Organisation (RDSO), Lucknow. The contract is for the comprehensive maintenance of a dedicated test track between Gudha and Thathana Mithri stations in the Jodhpur division of NWR.

announcements.subject: White Hall Commercial Company Ltd - 512431 - Board Meeting Outcome for Independent Director Outcome For 27-03-2026
announcements.detail: Independent Director Outcome for 27-03-2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Independent Directors of White Hall Commercial Company Limited held a meeting on March 27, 2026, from 3:30 PM to 4:30 PM. During the meeting, they reviewed the performance of the Non-Independent Directors and the Board as a whole. They also reviewed the performance of the Chairman, considering the views of Executive and Non-executive Directors. Additionally, the directors assessed the quality, quantity, and timeliness of information flow between the company management and the Board to ensure effective performance of their duties.

announcements.subject: Indian Overseas Bank - 532388 - Announcement Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Indian Overseas Bank has received a Giving Effect order from the Income-tax Department on March 26, 2026, pursuant to an ITAT Order dated December 31, 2024. The order, under Section 254 r/w Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, demands the bank to pay an amount of Rs. 642.74 Crores for tax liability for Assessment Year 2016-17. The bank is in the process of challenging these orders and the disallowances/additions made therein through the appropriate forum within the prescribed guidelines.

announcements.subject: IRB InvIT Fund - 540526 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: IRB Invit Fund has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: IRB InvIT Fund has informed the Exchange about the closure of its trading window. In accordance with the Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading by Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives, the trading window for dealing in the securities of the Trust will be closed from April 1, 2026. The window will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

announcements.subject: Ugro Capital Ltd - 511742 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Intimation of allotment of NCDs on private placement basis
announcements.ai_summary: Ugro Capital Ltd's Investment and Borrowing Committee has approved the allotment of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis on March 27, 2026. The company will allot 4,610 Subordinated, unsecured, rated, listed, transferable, taxable, redeemable, non-convertible debentures with a face value of INR 1,00,000 each, totaling INR 46.10 Crores. Additionally, 135,000 Listed, Rated, Senior, Secured, Transferable, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures with a face value of INR 10,000 each, totaling INR 135 Crores, will be allotted. The Series I NCDs have a tenure of 72 months and 9 days with an interest rate of 13.25%, maturing on April 5, 2032. The Series II NCDs have a tenure of 12 months and 22 days, maturing on April 18, 2027. These debentures are proposed to be listed on BSE Limited.

announcements.subject: Suraj Industries Ltd - 526211 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Update on Acquisition.
announcements.ai_summary: Suraj Industries Ltd has completed the acquisition of 24,800 equity shares of M/s Shri Gang Industries and Allied Products Limited (“Shri Gang”) from Mr. Ritesh Gupta. Following this acquisition, Suraj Industries Ltd's shareholding in Shri Gang has increased to 20.15% of Shri Gang's paid-up equity share capital. This update follows the company's previous intimation on March 26, 2026, regarding the acquisition.

announcements.subject: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd - 544526 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order
announcements.ai_summary: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd's material subsidiary, Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited, has received and accepted an order valued at INR 14 Crores. The order is from a renowned Independent Power producer/EPC Player for the supply of Solar PV Modules. The order is domestic in nature and is commercial in its terms. The execution of this order is expected to be completed by March 2026. This information is available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: SJVN Ltd - 533206 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: SJVN"s 412 MW Rampur Hydro Power Station surpassed Highest-Ever Generation
announcements.ai_summary: SJVN Ltd announced that its 412 MW Rampur Hydro Power Station in Himachal Pradesh has surpassed its highest-ever generation record. On March 26, 2026, the station generated 2098.03 million units, exceeding the previous record set in FY 2019-20. The Head of Project, Rampur HPS, dedicated this achievement to the SJVN Management's leadership and the teamwork of all employees. The Rampur HPS had previously achieved its Design Energy target of 1,878 million units for FY 2025-26 on December 8, 2025, marking the fastest achievement since its commissioning.

announcements.subject: Omax Autos Ltd - 520021 - Intimation Of Cyber Security Incident.
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed intimation of cyber Security incident on Company''s IT Infrastructure.
announcements.ai_summary: Omax Autos Ltd has confirmed a ransomware attack on its IT infrastructure, which was initially suspected on March 26, 2026. The company has stated that the incident has not impacted its core systems and operations. Omax Autos is currently assessing the extent of any potential loss or impact and conducting a detailed investigation with ongoing remedial actions. The company is also strengthening its cybersecurity systems to prevent future occurrences and will provide updates on material developments.

announcements.subject: Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd - 500777 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 LODR - Update
announcements.detail: Project Update
announcements.ai_summary: Tamilnadu Petroproducts Ltd has successfully completed the expansion activities at its Heavy Chemicals Division (HCD) plant. Operations at the expanded facility are scheduled to commence on March 28, 2026. Furthermore, the Tamil Nadu Pollution Control Board has granted the company its Consent to Operate for the enhanced capacity of 250 TPD of Caustic Soda production. This approval allows the company to operate and discharge emissions in compliance with the Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981, and discharge sewage and trade effluent under the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974.

announcements.subject: Dev Information Technology Ltd - 543462 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Intimation Regarding Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Information Technology Limited has announced the signing of an exclusive Master Distributor agreement with A21 Technologies LLP on March 27, 2026. This agreement is for the nationwide distribution of DEV IT's AI-powered business intelligence software, "Talligence." A21 Technologies LLP will act as the national master distributor, aiming to expand DEV IT's reach across India through a partner-led ecosystem. The collaboration is intended to enhance last-mile connectivity and accelerate the adoption of advanced business intelligence and analytics solutions, particularly for SMEs and MSMEs, by transforming Tally accounting data into actionable insights.

announcements.subject: Ethos Ltd - 543532 - Opening Of Ethos Watch Boutiques At Srinagar
announcements.detail: Opening of Ethos Watch Boutiques at Srinagar
announcements.ai_summary: Ethos Limited has inaugurated a new Ethos Watch Boutique in Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, on March 27, 2026. Located at Unit No-3, The Edition Mall, Sanat Nagar, this opening marks a significant step in strengthening the company's luxury brand portfolio and its presence in a key luxury retail market. This expansion aligns with the company's strategic vision to make exclusive brands more accessible to customers across India. With this new boutique, Ethos Limited now operates a total of 92 boutiques nationwide.

announcements.subject: Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd - 532527 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 6,40,000 Equity Shares to Riddhi Portfolio Private Limited (Promoter) pursuant to exercise of warrants allotted on preferential basis.
announcements.ai_summary: Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd has approved the conversion of 6,40,000 warrants into equity shares and the allotment of these shares to Riddhi Portfolio Private Limited, a promoter. This action was taken by the Capital Market Committee on March 27, 2026. The conversion involved an aggregate amount of Rs. 100,80,00,000/- received from the warrant holder at a rate of Rs. 1,575/- per warrant. These warrants were initially allotted on a preferential basis on August 14, 2025, with a face value of Rs. 2/- each. The allotment increases the company's issued, subscribed, and paid-up equity share capital to Rs. 36,33,41,208/-, comprising 18,16,70,604 equity shares.

announcements.subject: Cochin Shipyard Ltd - 540678 - Comments Of The Board Of Directors Of The Company Pursuant To SEBI Master Circular Dated January 30, 2026
announcements.detail: Please refer attachment
announcements.ai_summary: Cochin Shipyard Limited's Board of Directors met on March 27, 2026, to discuss a fine imposed by BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The fine, aggregating to Rs. 9,77,040 each (including GST @ 18%), was for non-compliance with Regulation 17(1) regarding the composition of the Board of Directors and Regulations 18 and 19 concerning the Audit Committee and Nomination and Remuneration Committee for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The Board acknowledged that the appointment of directors vests with the Government of India. While Dr. Seema Suri was appointed as an independent director on May 20, 2025, the appointment of the remaining five independent directors is awaited. The Board advised continuing follow-up with the Administrative Ministry and filing waiver requests once compliance is achieved.

announcements.subject: Time Technoplast Ltd - 532856 - Intimation of Repayment of Commercial Paper (CP)
announcements.detail:
We hereby certify that the Company has made timely repayment of maturity amount of below mentioned commercial paper in full:
Scrip Code: 731121
ISIN No.: INE508G14IL4
Maturity Date: 27-03-2026
Date of Repayment: 27-03-2026
announcements.ai_summary: Time Technoplast Limited has certified that it has made timely repayment of the maturity amount in full for a commercial paper. The commercial paper had a maturity date of March 27, 2026, and the repayment was made on the same date. The Scrip Code for this commercial paper is 731121, and its ISIN No. is INE508G14IL4. This notification is in accordance with SEBI's Operational Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021.

announcements.subject: T T Ltd-$ - 514142 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition
announcements.detail: Acquisition of 1,14,575 shares by T.T. Brands Limited, Promoter Group
announcements.ai_summary: T T Brands Limited, a promoter group entity of T T Ltd, has acquired 1,14,575 Equity Shares of TTL. This acquisition took place between March 23, 2026, and March 27, 2026. The disclosure is made under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Ceigall India Ltd - 544223 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: In continuation to our earlier letter dated 20th March 2026 we are pleased to inform you that Ceigall Infra projects Private Limited ('CIPPL'), a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Ceigall India Limited ('CIL') has received Letter of Award (LOA) dated 27th March 2026 from National Highways Authority of India for the Construction of 6-lane access-controlled Spur connectivity starting from Ch. 15+100 of Ambala - Chandigarh section of NH-205A and terminating ....
announcements.ai_summary: Ceigall Infra projects Private Limited (CIPPL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Ceigall India Limited (CIL), has received a Letter of Award (LOA) dated March 27, 2026, from the National Highways Authority of India. This award is for the construction of a 6-lane access-controlled Spur connectivity project, spanning 10.300 Km, on the Ambala-Chandigarh section of NH-205A and terminating at the Zirakpur Bypass in Punjab. The contract is to be executed on a Hybrid Annuity Mode (HAM). The construction period is 18 months, followed by a 15-year Operation & Maintenance period. The broad consideration or size of the order is Rs. 603.00 Crore (Bid Cost). This is a domestic order, and neither the promoter nor group companies have any interest in the awarding entity.

announcements.subject: Apcotex Industries Ltd - 523694 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On 27Th March 2026
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed Outcome of Board Meeting held on 27th March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: A meeting of the Board of Directors of Apcotex Industries Limited was held on March 27, 2026, where several key decisions were made. The Board approved entering into a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) and a Share Subscription Cum Shareholders Agreement (SSSHA) with Amplus Ceres Solar Private Limited. As part of this, the company will subscribe to a minimum of 2.55% of the equity shares of Amplus Ceres Solar Private Limited, a subsidiary of Amplus Energy Solutions PTE Limited, for a total value of INR 72,00,000/-. Additionally, the Board approved a similar PPA and SSSHA with Amplus Energy One Private Limited, subscribing to a minimum of 2.14% of its equity shares for INR 1,32,00,000/-. The face value of these shares is INR 10/- each. Furthermore, Mr. Ravishankar Sharma was re-appointed as an Executive Director for two years, effective May 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: JNK India Ltd - 544167 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding receipt of order
announcements.ai_summary: JNK India Limited has announced the receipt of a major order on March 27, 2026, from JNK Global Co., Ltd., Korea. This order is for providing support services and supplies for a Cracker Furnace Package of a refinery project in India. JNK Global is a promoter of JNK India Limited, and the company has confirmed there is no potential conflict of interest arising from this transaction. The project delivery schedule is set for February 2, 2028. This order is classified as "Major" based on its value, and it is an international order to be executed in India.

announcements.subject: Rungta Irrigation Ltd - 530449 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Meeting Outcome For Consideration And Approval Of Increase In Authorised Share Capital Of The Company And Consequential Amendment In Memorandum Of Association Of The Company.
announcements.detail: Board Meeting outcome for Consideration And Approval Of Increase In Authorised Share Capital Of The Company And Consequential Amendment In Memorandum Of Association Of The Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Rungta Irrigation Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved and recommended an increase in the company's authorized share capital. The authorized share capital will be increased from Rs. 20,00,00,000 (Rupees Twenty Crores) divided into 2,00,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each, to Rs. 40,00,00,000 (Rupees Forty Crores) divided into 4,00,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each. This increase is subject to shareholder approval and other regulatory approvals. The Board also approved the Postal Ballot Notice for this purpose, appointing Ishant & Associates as the Scrutinizer, and fixed March 27, 2026, as the cut-off date for determining eligible shareholders for the postal ballot and e-voting. E-voting will commence on April 2, 2026, and end on May 1, 2026.

announcements.subject: JSW Steel Ltd - 500228 - Update On 50:50 JV Between JSW Steel Limited And JFE Steel Corporation, For The Steel Business Of Bhushan Power And Steel Limited.
announcements.detail: Update on 50:50 Joint Venture between JSW Steel LImited and JFE Steel Corporation, Japan for the Steel Business of Bhushan Power and Steel Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Steel Limited has announced the completion of the transfer of the steel business undertaking of Bhushan Power and Steel Limited (BPSL) to JSW Sambalpur Steel Limited, a subsidiary of JSW Steel. This transfer was executed via a slump sale on a going concern basis and was completed on March 27, 2026. This is a key step in the previously approved 50:50 joint venture partnership between JSW Steel Limited and JFE Steel Corporation, Japan, for the steel business of BPSL.

announcements.company: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT
announcements.subject: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT - 543261 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Brookfield India Real Estate Trust REIT has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Brookprop Management Services Private Limited, acting as the Manager for Brookfield India Real Estate Trust (“Brookfield India REIT”), conducted meetings with various investors on March 25, 2026, and March 27, 2026. These meetings provided business and financial updates for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025, for Brookfield India REIT.

announcements.subject: Onelife Capital Advisors Ltd - 533632 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Dated 27/03/2026
announcements.detail: Enclosed herewith Outcome of Board Meeting dated 27/03/2026
announcements.ai_summary: Onelife Capital Advisors Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved several loan grants and an investment. The Board approved a loan of Rs. 1,50,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Fifty Lakhs) to Mr. JayKishor Chatuvedi. Additionally, loans were approved for Abhidev Consultancy Services Private Limited (up to Rs. 5,50,00,000 at 12% per annum), Jeevan Jyoti Vanijya Limited (up to Rs. 2,00,00,000), Gandhi Nagar Leasing and Finance Limited (up to Rs. 2,00,00,000), and Gandhi Nagar Leasing and Finance (up to Rs. 1,50,00,000). The Board also approved an investment of up to Rs. 1,50,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Fifty Lakhs) in Dealmoney Real Estate Private Limited, a subsidiary. The meeting was held from 1:00 PM to 3:35 PM.

announcements.subject: HEG Ltd - 509631 - Update Regarding Composite Scheme Of Arrangement Amongst HEG Limited And HEG Graphite Limited And Bhilwara Energy Limited And Their Respective Shareholders And Creditors Under Sections 230 To 232 Of The Companies Act, 2013 ('Scheme')
announcements.detail: Attached
announcements.ai_summary: HEG Limited has received an order from the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Indore Bench, dated March 26, 2026. This order allows and disposes of Company Application CA(CAA)/1(MP)2026, directing the convening of meetings for equity shareholders, secured creditors, and unsecured creditors of HEG Limited, as well as the meeting of equity shareholders of Bhilwara Energy Limited. This is in furtherance to the composite scheme of arrangement amongst HEG Limited, HEG Graphite Limited, and Bhilwara Energy Limited. Details regarding these meetings will be communicated in due course via a Notice.

announcements.subject: Tata Communications Ltd - 500483 - Intimation Regarding Issuance, Allotment And Listing Of Commercial Paper Amounting To Rs 750 Crore
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding issuance, allotment and listing of Commercial Paper amounting to Rs 750 Crore
announcements.ai_summary: Tata Communications Limited has issued and allotted Commercial Paper aggregating to an amount of ₹750 crore on March 25, 2026. The Commercial Paper has a face value of ₹5,00,000/- per security and a discount rate of 7.85% per annum. The redemption date for this issuance is April 24, 2026. The Commercial Paper, with ISIN INE151A14263, was listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited on March 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: Dev Labtech Venture Ltd - 543848 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Amendments to Memorandum & Articles of Association
announcements.detail: Amendment in Capital Clause and Object Clause of MOA of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Dev Labtech Venture Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved an increase in the company's authorized share capital. The authorized share capital will be increased from Rs. 15,00,00,000 (Rupees Fifteen Crore) divided into 1,50,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each, to Rs. 25,00,00,000 (Rupees Twenty-Five Crore) divided into 2,50,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each. This increase is subject to shareholder approval via postal ballot and other necessary regulatory approvals. Additionally, the Board approved the alteration of the Object Clause of the Memorandum of Association and the sub-division of equity shares, where 1 Equity Share of Rs. 10 will be split into 2 Equity Shares of Rs. 5 each, also subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Embassy Office Parks REIT - 542602 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Embassy Office Parks REIT has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Embassy Office Parks REIT, through its Manager Embassy Office Parks Management Services Private Limited, hosted a virtual group meeting on March 27, 2026. The session was for Nuvama Wealth & Sales Teams and provided an overview of Indian REITs and the Commercial Real Estate Sector, along with a specific overview of Embassy REIT. Senior Management Personnel from the Manager presented the information during the meeting.

announcements.subject: Eicher Motors Ltd - 505200 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: The 2026 Royal Enfield Guerrilla 450: Sportier Performance meets urban agility
announcements.ai_summary: Eicher Motors Ltd has announced the launch of the 2026 Royal Enfield Guerrilla 450, featuring an all-new APEX variant. This variant offers sportier design and new road-focused tyres, enhancing urban agility and performance. The existing Dash and Flash variants will also receive improved grippier tyres, with the Dash variant getting a new colorway. Bookings for the 2026 Guerrilla 450 APEX commence today, March 27, 2026, with pan-India retail sales beginning on March 31, 2026. The APEX variant is built around the Sherpa engine and features a lower, more committed riding posture with road-biased 17” Vredestein Centuro ST tyres for enhanced grip. It also includes updated ride modes with mode retention and sharper visual aesthetics with new colourways.

announcements.subject: YOGI Ltd - 511702 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Please find the attached Intimation of receipt of Purchase order.
announcements.ai_summary: YOGI Ltd has received purchase orders from Companion Vinimay Trading Private Limited for the supply and delivery of various industrial components, including Structure Assembly, Head Assembly, Rotary Table & Electrical Accessories, Tool Changer & Additional Axis, and Accessories. The total value of these orders is approximately Rs. 102.36 Crores, excluding all taxes. The company has received four purchase orders, each for one complete set of the specified equipment. The products will be delivered within an agreed timeline of approximately 15 days, with standard terms related to quality, delivery schedule, and pricing mutually agreed upon by both parties.

announcements.subject: Lactose India Ltd - 524202 - Corrigendum Notice For Shareholders Meeting - By NCLT Scheduled To Be Convened On Saturday, 28Th March 2026
announcements.detail: We hereby submit the intimation towards the corrigendum notice issued for shareholders meeting to be conveyed pursuant to NCLT order, the meeting is scheduled to be held on Saturday, 28th March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Lactose India Ltd has issued a corrigendum notice for an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) scheduled to be held on Saturday, March 28, 2026. This corrigendum provides modifications and clarifications to the resolutions and explanatory statements previously communicated in the notice dated February 27, 2026. The EGM will be conducted via Video Conferencing / Other Audio Visual Means (VC / OAVM). The corrigendum is being issued to provide additional disclosures as required by SEBI and will form an integral part of the original EGM notice. The company's shareholding pattern before and after the implementation of a scheme is also being detailed.

announcements.subject: Chemtech Industrial Valves Ltd - 537326 - Board Meeting Outcome for Board Meeting Outcome For The Meeting Held On Friday, 27Th March 2026.
announcements.detail: Kindly find enclosed herewith the Outcome of the Board Meeting held today i.e. Friday, 27th March 2026 for conversion of the Convertible Warrants to Equity Shares
announcements.ai_summary: Chemtech Industrial Valves Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the allotment of 5,00,000 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each at a premium of Rs. 190 each to Promoter/Promoter Group. This allotment is pursuant to the conversion of Convertible Warrants, which were initially issued and allotted on a preferential basis on October 1, 2024. The conversion was approved in compliance with SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2018, and received in-principle approval from BSE. The allottees are Harsh Pradeep Badkur and Puneet Pradeep Badkur, each receiving 2,50,000 equity shares.

announcements.subject: Nucleus Software Exports Ltd - 531209 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Nucleus Software Exports Limited has informed the Exchange regarding press release dated March 27, 2026, titled "Nucleus Software Marks 30 years on BSE, Advances Customer-Centric, AI-Led Global Growth Strategy"
announcements.ai_summary: Nucleus Software Exports Ltd has achieved a significant milestone, marking 30 years of its listing on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) on March 27, 2026. The company, listed in 1995, has established a global presence, serving over 200 financial institutions in more than 50 countries with its digital lending and transaction banking solutions, FinnOne Neo® and FinnAxia®. Nucleus Software attributes its sustained growth to deep customer-centricity and domain-led innovation, enabling financial institutions to transform their operations. Looking ahead, the company is focused on scaling its AI-led capabilities to support the industry's shift towards AI-driven, real-time, and embedded financial services.

announcements.subject: Birlanu Ltd - 509675 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Dated March 27, 2026
announcements.detail: In-principal approval for enhancement of the corporate guarantee limit from Euro 45 million to Euro 55 million
announcements.ai_summary: BirlaNu Ltd's Board of Directors, in their meeting held on March 27, 2026, granted in-principal approval to enhance the corporate guarantee limit from Euro 45 million to Euro 55 million. This enhanced guarantee, which may include a Stand-by Letter of Credit, will be provided on behalf of BirlaNu International GmbH, Germany, a wholly-owned subsidiary, and its subsidiaries. The purpose of this guarantee is to secure existing and future loan facilities availed or to be availed by BirlaNu International GmbH and its subsidiaries. Further details will be submitted at the time of execution of the corporate guarantee.

announcements.subject: iStreet Network Ltd - 524622 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of Equity Shares pursuant to conversion of warrants through circular resolution.
announcements.ai_summary: iStreet Network Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the conversion of 11,16,667 warrants into 11,16,667 equity shares of face value ₹ 4 each. This conversion was made for cash upon receipt of the exercise price of ₹ 4.5 per warrant, aggregating to ₹ 50,24,999. The allotment was made to public category warrant holders, including Viral S. Acharya, Shahana Sen Mishra, Vipin Mishra, and Deldan Otsal. These newly allotted equity shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company. Following this allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital has increased from ₹ 27,32,00,008 to ₹ 27,76,66,676.

announcements.subject: Colgate Palmolive (India) Ltd - 500830 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Please find herewith attached Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Colgate Palmolive (India) Ltd has announced a partnership with Mumbai Indians, naming Colgate Total as their Dental Performance Partner. This collaboration aims to integrate oral health into the athletes' preparation for the 2026 season. As part of this initiative, Colgate has launched the PLOT (Performance Linked Oral Test) framework, a comprehensive oral health screening program for players. This program will involve dental screenings conducted by Dr. Moez Khakiani using advanced intraoral scanning technology and WHO-based oral health assessments to identify any issues that could impact player performance and recovery.

announcements.subject: Suditi Industries Ltd - 521113 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Outcome of circular resolution for allotment of 4,33,100 Equity shares and 15,08,800 Warrants convertible into Equity shares on preferntial basis
announcements.ai_summary: Suditi Industries Ltd has approved the allotment of 4,33,100 equity shares at Rs. 59.12 each, aggregating to Rs. 2,56,04,872, to non-promoter category allottees on a preferential basis. Additionally, the company will allot 15,08,800 warrants convertible into equity shares at Rs. 59.12 each, with a warrant subscription price of Rs. 14.78 and an exercise price of Rs. 44.34, totaling Rs. 8,92,00,256. This allotment follows member approval at an EGM on January 16, 2026, and in-principal approval from BSE on March 16, 2026. The equity shares allotted will rank pari-passu with existing shares and will be subject to lock-in provisions.

announcements.subject: Vishnu Chemicals Ltd - 516072 - Update On Closure Of Vishnu International Trading FZE, UAE, Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company
announcements.detail: Update on closure of Vishnu International Trading FZE, UAE, Wholly Owned Subsidiary Company is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Vishnu Chemicals Ltd has provided an update on the closure of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Vishnu International Trading FZE, located in the UAE. The voluntary winding-up process is still ongoing and has taken longer than initially expected due to prevailing geopolitical conditions in the Middle East. The company now anticipates that the closure of this subsidiary will be completed within approximately six additional months. This information is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 533573 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited receives USFDA Final Approval for Paroxetine Extended-Release Tablets USP, 12.5 mg.
announcements.ai_summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited has received final approval from the US Food & Drug Administration (USFDA) for its supplemental Abbreviated New Drug Application (sANDA) for Paroxetine Extended-Release Tablets USP, 12.5 mg. This approval makes the company's product therapeutically equivalent to Paxil CR Tablets, 12.5 mg, of Apotex Inc. Paroxetine extended-release tablets are indicated for the treatment of Major depressive disorder (MDD), Panic disorder (PD), Social anxiety disorder (SAD), and Premenstrual dysphoric disorder (PMDD). This approval adds to Alembic's existing portfolio, bringing their total USFDA ANDA approvals to 235, comprising 216 final and 19 tentative approvals.

announcements.subject: Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd - 539301 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Media Release dated 27th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Arvind SmartSpaces Ltd (ASL) has announced its entry into the society redevelopment segment with its first residential apartment project in Mumbai. The project, located in Santacruz (West), has a top-line potential of approximately Rs. 300 crore and a total estimated carpet area for sale of 42,000 sq. ft. This marks ASL's second project in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR) and its first in the society redevelopment category. The company has also reported that its cumulative new business development top-line potential for the year now stands at approximately Rs. 3,140 crore.

announcements.subject: Gateway Distriparks Ltd - 543489 - Disclosures Under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition Of Shares And Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: refer the attached file
announcements.ai_summary: Perfect Communications Private Limited, a promoter of Gateway Distriparks Limited, has acquired 3,566,930 equity shares of the company. This acquisition, disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, was made on March 27, 2026. The specific percentage of total voting capital before and after this transaction is not provided in the announcement, but the acquisition by a promoter indicates a potential increase in their stake in Gateway Distriparks Limited.

announcements.company: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd
announcements.subject:
Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd - 532921 - Media Release Regarding 'APSEZ Sets Up India'S First
Port Of Refuge To Boost Maritime Safety.'
announcements.detail: Media Release
announcements.ai_summary: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone Ltd (APSEZ) has launched India's first Port of Refuge (PoR) to enhance maritime safety. This initiative addresses a critical gap in maritime emergency infrastructure and establishes a structured mechanism for handling distressed vessels. APSEZ has entered into a tripartite MoU with SMIT Salvage, the salvage and emergency response division of Royal Boskalis Westminster NV, and the Maritime Emergency Response Centre (MERC), bringing global expertise to the operation. The PoR initiative aligns with international maritime conventions and aims to bolster safety and environmental protection. APSEZ will designate Dighi Port on the west coast and Gopalpur Port on the east coast as Ports of Refuge, serving key global shipping routes.

announcements.subject: Escorts Kubota Ltd - 500495 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)- Updates on Litigation(s)/ dispute(s) or the outcome impacting the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Escorts Kubota Ltd has announced a significant development in a tax dispute. The State Tax Officer, Mandaveli Assessment Circle, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, has dropped a tax demand of Rs. 46.79 Crores, along with any associated interest and penalty, for the Financial Year 2019-20. This order, dated March 26, 2026, resolves the tax demands that were contested by the company. The company had argued that agricultural tractors were wrongly classified as road tractors and that the tax was incorrectly computed on the total GST turnover instead of just the tractor turnover. This outcome is a positive development for the company, as previously communicated on May 08, 2025, December 30, 2025, and January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Triveni Engineering & Industries Ltd - 532356 - Reply To Your Query No.  L/SURV/ONL/PV/SG/ 2025-2026/1004 Dated 27Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: REPLY TO YOUR QUERY NO. L/SURV/ONL/PV/SG/2025-2026 / 1004 FOR VOLUME MOVEMENT LETTER
announcements.ai_summary: The company, Triveni Engineering & Industries Ltd, has responded to a query from BSE Limited regarding an increase in the trading volume of its securities. The query, dated March 27, 2026, requested clarification on this unusual volume movement. Triveni Engineering & Industries Ltd has stated that there are no unpublished events or information that require disclosure to the stock exchanges under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. Investors should note that the company has confirmed no material non-public information is driving the recent volume activity.

announcements.subject:
Jaiprakash Associates Ltd - 532532 - Intimation In Accordance With Regulation 30 Of The Securities And Exchange Board Of India (Listing Obligations And Disclosure
Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.detail: Intimation Regulation 30
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jaiprakash Associates Limited (JAL) has informed the Exchange about a consented arbitral award dated March 25, 2026, in relation to a pending arbitration with UltraTech Cement Limited (UTCL). Upon receipt of settlement proceeds amounting to INR 1,000,00,00,000 (INR One Thousand Crores) from UTCL, all claims and liabilities concerning Series A Redeemable Preference Shares issued by UTCL in favor of JAL will be extinguished. Consequently, UTCL will be entitled to continue holding, using, and operating the JP Super Plant and associated mines and infrastructure at Kajrahat, Uttar Pradesh, free from any claims by JAL.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Compliances-Reg. 57 (1) - Certificate of interest payment/Principal in case of NCD
announcements.detail:
We hereby certify that our Company has made timely payment of interest amount in respect of the Secured Redeemable NCDs issued by our Company through Public Issue and listed on the Stock Exchanges.

Refer attached PDF for more details.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Sammaan Capital Limited (formerly Indiabulls Housing Finance Limited) has certified that it has made timely payment of interest on its Secured Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued through a Public Issue and listed on the stock exchanges. The company made the interest payment on March 26, 2026, which was due on March 27, 2026, for multiple NCD series with ISINs INE148I07RJ4, INE148I07RO4, INE148I07RP1, INE148I07RU1, INE148I07RX5, and INE148I07RZ0. The total interest paid across these series on March 26, 2026, amounted to approximately INR 36.59 lacs.

announcements.subject: Jindal Stainless Ltd - 532508 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Jindal Stainless Limited has announced a partnership with Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH), a T20 league team, as their Official Stainless Partner. This marks Jindal Stainless's debut association with the Indian Premier League (IPL) and is a strategic move to enhance brand visibility and connect with the youth. The partnership includes exclusive branding rights for Jindal Stainless across key product segments such as stainless steel pipes and tubes, rebars, and kitchenware and sinks. Managing Director, Mr. Abhyuday Jindal, highlighted the partnership's role in showcasing the versatility of stainless steel, while SRH CEO, Mr. K Shanmugam, emphasized the shared values of performance and resilience.

announcements.subject: ITCONS E-Solutions Ltd - 543806 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, - Formation Of Advisory Committee
announcements.detail: The Advisory Committee of the Board has been constituted effective from March 27, 2026, the members of the Advisory Committee will  provide guidance to the Board on business strategy, long term planning, operational and financial performance. For more details please refer attached file
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: ITCONS E-Solutions Ltd has constituted an Advisory Committee to the Board, effective from March 27, 2026. The committee members, including Alok Aggarwal (Chairman), Deepak Kumar Srivastava (Member), and Sanjay Kumar Verma (Member), will provide guidance on business strategy, long-term planning, and operational and financial performance. Mr. Deepak Kumar Srivastava has been appointed for a period of one year commencing March 27, 2026, and brings over four decades of legal experience, including 31 years in the Uttar Pradesh Judiciary. The formation of this committee is expected to offer valuable industry insights and financial expertise to support the company's growth.

announcements.subject: Xpro India Ltd - 590013 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 - Commencement Of Commercial Production/Operations
announcements.detail: The Company informs that the new dielectric film line at Barjora, WB was commissioned on March 27, 2026 and is operational.
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Xpro India Limited has announced the commencement of commercial production for its new dielectric film line at Barjora, West Bengal, on March 27, 2026. This new line is now operational. Additionally, the company provided an update on its UAE project, being implemented by its subsidiary, Xpro Dielectric Films FZ-LLC. Xpro India Limited is actively monitoring evolving regional conditions and any potential impact on this project.

announcements.company: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust
announcements.subject: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust - 543655 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust, through its Investment Manager EAAA Real Assets Managers Limited, has informed the Exchange about the closure of the trading window for its securities. The trading window will be closed from April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results for the financial year ending March 31, 2026, and the declaration of distributions to Unitholders. This measure is in accordance with the Policy on Unpublished Price Sensitive Information and Dealing in Securities.

announcements.subject: 20 Microns Ltd - 533022 - Execution Of Loan Agreement For Shareholder/Inter-Corporate Loan With Sievert 20 Microns Building Materials Private Limited
announcements.detail: Execution of Loan Agreement for Shareholder/Inter-Corporate Loan with Sievert 20 Microns Building Materials Private Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: 20 Microns Limited has entered into a Loan Agreement on March 27, 2026, with Sievert 20 Microns Building Materials Private Limited, an associate company, to provide a shareholder/inter-corporate loan of ₹2,00,00,000 (Rupees Two Crore only). This transaction is classified as a Related Party Transaction but is not considered material. The loan is provided on an arm's length basis and in the ordinary course of business. The Audit Committee of 20 Microns Limited has approved this loan, and it is also pursuant to member approval obtained through a Postal Ballot on March 9, 2026, authorizing the company to grant loans.

announcements.subject: Axis Solutions Ltd - 511144 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Memorandum of Understanding /Agreements
announcements.detail: Execution of Loan agreement with Vivriti Capital Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Axis Solutions Limited has executed a Deed of Hypothecation with Vivriti Capital Limited on March 27, 2026, to secure a working capital facility of Rs. 25.00 crores. This facility is intended to support the expansion of the company's business operations. The agreement involves a subservient and continuing charge on all company assets, including current assets, book debt, and movable fixed assets. Additionally, a first-ranking exclusive charge is placed on a debt service reserve account or cash collateral, equivalent to 15.77% of the facility amount, held as an interest-free security deposit with a lien and set-off in favor of Vivriti Capital Limited. This transaction is not with a related party and is being undertaken in the ordinary course of business.

announcements.subject: Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd - 524136 - INTIMATION OF RECEIPT OF CERTIFICATE OF INCORPORATION OF WHOLLY OWNED SUBSIDIARY
announcements.detail: INTIMATION OF RECEIPT OF INCORPORATION OF WHOLLY OWNED SUBSIDIARY
announcements.ai_summary: Pee Cee Cosma Sope Limited has incorporated a wholly owned subsidiary named "Pee Cee Energy and Reality Limited". The Certificate of Incorporation was issued by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India, on March 27, 2026. The authorized share capital of the new subsidiary is Rs. 15,00,000/-, with a paid-up share capital of Rs. 5,00,000/-. The registered office of the subsidiary will be located in Agra, Uttar Pradesh. This incorporation is a disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Emami Paper Mills Ltd - 533208 - Intimation Of Redemption Of Unlisted Series II Tranche III Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares (OCRPS) Having ISIN - INE830C04038
announcements.detail: Please find the intimation for the redemption of OCRPS.
announcements.ai_summary: Emami Paper Mills Limited has redeemed its 2,70,000 unlisted Series II - Tranche III Optionally Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares (OCRPS) on March 27, 2026. Each OCRPS had a face value of Rs.100/- and a redemption premium of Rs.500/-. The redemption was carried out in accordance with the terms of the issue and was funded from the company's available profits/reserves. This action follows a Board of Directors' resolution communicated on February 12, 2026.

announcements.subject: Abans Enterprises Ltd - 512165 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On March 27, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting held on March 27, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Abans Enterprises Ltd, in their meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved several key personnel changes. Ms. Shardul Chaturvedi resigned as Non-Executive, Non-Independent Director, effective end of business hours on March 27, 2026. Mr. Ankit Joshi has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer (Key Managerial Personnel) effective April 01, 2026. Ms. Mahiti Rath resigned as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer (Key Managerial Personnel) effective end of business hours on March 27, 2026. Mr. Sahil Gurav has been appointed as the new Company Secretary & Compliance Officer (Key Managerial Personnel) effective March 28, 2026, and has also been authorized for materiality assessments and stock exchange disclosures.

announcements.subject: Ceinsys Tech Ltd - 538734 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Intimation for receipt of Service order from Indian Space Research Organization (ISRO)
announcements.ai_summary: Ceinsys Tech Limited has been awarded a service order from the Indian Space Research Organization (ISRO) for Product Design & Manufacturing Collection Commercial Multi-user 3 Year Subscription Renewal. The total value of this order, including GST, is Rs. 3,24,50,000/- (Rupees Three Crore Twenty-Four Lakh Fifty Thousand Only). The subscription is for a period of 3 years. This is a domestic order, and there are no related party transactions involved.

announcements.subject: K.P. Energy Ltd - 539686 - Intimation Of Receipt Of Letter Of Award (Loa) For Development Of A Wind-Solar Hybrid Power Project In Gujarat Aggregating To 91.4 MW.
announcements.detail: K.P. Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Receipt of Letter of Award (LoA) for Development of a Wind-Solar Hybrid Power Project in Gujarat aggregating to 91.4 MW. Detailed disclosure is attached herewith.
announcements.ai_summary: K.P. Energy Limited has received a Letter of Award (LoA) from JK Paper Limited for the development of a 91.4 MW Wind-Solar Hybrid Power Project in Gujarat. The project will be executed on a complete turnkey basis, including engineering, procurement, installation, commissioning, and development of evacuation infrastructure for grid connectivity. K.P. Energy Limited will also be responsible for obtaining all necessary statutory and regulatory clearances and providing operation & maintenance (O&M) services for the Balance of Plant (BoP) of the wind capacity and the complete installed capacity of the solar project. This award strengthens K.P. Energy Limited's position in the renewable energy sector.

announcements.subject: Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Ltd - 500032 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of 2711,98,82,478 Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares (CCPS) of face value of Rs.1/- each at par on conversion of loan in accordance with the Framework Agreement executed on March 26, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Committee of Directors of Bajaj Hindusthan Sugar Limited, in a meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the allotment of 27,11,98,82,478 Series A 0.01% Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares (CCPS) of face value of Re.1/- each at par. This allotment, aggregating to Rs. 2711.99 Crores, is a conversion of loan in accordance with the "Resolution Plan" and a Framework Agreement executed on March 26, 2026. The allotment is to the lenders of the company on a preferential basis. The company will allot the remaining 2 CCPS to two other lenders upon completion of their loan conversion process.

announcements.subject: Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd - 532796 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On Friday, March 27, 2026.
announcements.detail: Outcome of the Board Meeting held on Friday, March 27, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd, in their meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved a proposal for investment in Lumax Alps Alpine India Private Limited (LAAIPL), a Joint Venture Company. The investment will be in the form of equity, amounting to up to Rs. 7 Crores. LAAIPL operates in the Automotive Components industry. The company currently holds a 50% equity share capital in LAAIPL, and this transaction will be conducted on an arm's length basis. The disclosure provides details for FY 2024-25 for LAAIPL, including a Net Worth of Rs. 2,634.46 Lakhs, Profit After Tax of Rs. 270.52 Lakhs, and Turnover of Rs. 4,917.60 Lakhs.

announcements.subject: Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd - 544367 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: Receipt of Significant Order by Material Step-down subsidiary for supply and Integration of Battery Energy Storage System.
announcements.ai_summary: Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd has announced that its material step-down subsidiary, ENDOKS ENERJİ ANONİM ŞİRKETİ, has received a significant order for the supply and integration of a Battery Energy Storage System. The order is from an international entity and is described as a single large order. The execution of this contract is expected to be completed by approximately December 2027. The broad consideration for the order is approximately INR 152 Crores, with an option to increase it up to INR 292 Crores. This order does not involve related party transactions.

announcements.subject: Oriental Rail Infrastructure Ltd - 531859 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board meeting
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Oriental Rail Infrastructure Ltd, in its meeting held on March 27, 2026, considered and approved several matters. Key among these was the variation in the objects of a Preferential Issue, which was initially approved by shareholders on January 19, 2024. This variation requires further shareholder approval. The Board also approved the Notice of Postal Ballot for seeking this shareholder approval and appointed Mr. Shiv Hari Jalan as the Scrutinizer to oversee the remote e-voting process for the Postal Ballot.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Disclosure Under Regulation 10(6) Of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
announcements.ai_summary: Nexome Capital Markets Limited (formerly SMIFS Capital Markets Limited) has made a disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of equity shares by the Promoters and Promoter Group, specifically by Lend Lease Company (India) Limited. This acquisition is in compliance with Regulation 10(4)(a) and 10(4)(b) read with Regulation 10(6) of the SAST Regulations, 2011, and relates to the subscription of a Rights Issue of Shares, including additional shares allotted by Nexome Capital Markets Limited.

announcements.subject: SG Finserve Ltd - 539199 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of Equity Shares upon conversion of Warrants
announcements.ai_summary: SG Finserve Limited's Allotment Committee, in its meeting on March 27, 2026, approved the allotment of 54,47,222 equity shares of face value ₹10/- each upon the conversion of an equal number of warrants. This conversion was made upon receipt of the balance 75% payment of ₹337.5/- per warrant, totaling ₹1,83,84,37,425/-. The allottees include Shri Rohan Gupta (Promoter) who received 28,25,000 shares, RBA Finance and Investment Company and Shri Ashish Kacholia (Non-Promoters) who each received 11,11,111 shares, and AGDG Enterprises LLP and Anubhav Gupta Enterprises LLP (Non-Promoters) who received 2,00,000 shares each. Consequently, the company's issued and paid-up capital has increased to ₹65,26,72,220/-, comprising 6,52,67,222 equity shares.

announcements.subject: Jupiter Life Line Hospitals Ltd - 543980 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order
announcements.detail: The Company has received a letter from Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) conveying the acceptance of its tender for allotment of land on lease basis
announcements.ai_summary: Jupiter Life Line Hospitals Ltd has received a letter from the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) confirming the acceptance of its tender for land allotment on a lease basis. The allotment pertains to a land parcel of approximately 10,026.44 sqm, located at plot no. SF5 in the GTxT-Block of Bandra-Kurla Complex, Maharashtra. The lease will be for a period of 80 years, with a total consideration of approximately Rs. 354 Crores. This land is intended for the development of a hospital with approximately 400 beds, subject to various statutory and regulatory approvals.

announcements.subject: Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd - 500040 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release of Birla Estates Private Limited a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Birla Estates Private Limited (BEPL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited, has announced its first redevelopment project in Mumbai. The company is entering into a joint redevelopment arrangement with Parinee Real Estate Builders to redevelop Anmol Co-operative Housing Society and Bhartiya Bhavan Co-operative Housing Society in Khar West, Mumbai. This project is expected to have a saleable area of 2.9 lakh sq.ft and an estimated revenue potential of INR 1,700 crore. The development will focus on luxury residential apartments. This initiative strengthens Birla Estates' presence in Mumbai, leveraging the city's demand for quality housing through redevelopment.

announcements.subject: JK Cement Ltd - 532644 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On March 27, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held today on March 27, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of JK Cement Limited, in its meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved entering into an Asset Purchase Agreement to acquire cement grinding assets and land. The company will acquire 0.24 MnTPA cement grinding assets from Sri Chakra Cement Limited and approximately 34 acres of land from Envean Enterprises Private Limited, Sri Chakra Cement Limited, and K Sanjay Kumar. The aggregate consideration for this acquisition is Rs. 28.79 crores. These cement grinding assets have been non-operational since April 2025. The transaction is contingent upon the finalization and execution of definitive agreements and the fulfillment of customary conditions precedents.

announcements.subject: Nitin Spinners Ltd - 532698 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intimation of Acquisition under regulation 30 of the SEBI (listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Nitin Spinners Ltd's Investment Committee has approved the execution of a Power Supply Agreement and a Share Purchase Agreement with CGE II Hybrid Energy Private Limited. The acquisition is aimed at securing a renewable power supply of 10 MW for the company's plants located in Rajasthan. CGE II Hybrid Energy Private Limited has an authorized share capital of Rs. 5,72,98,72,727 and a paid-up share capital of Rs. 1,42,80,30,303, with no turnover reported as of March 31, 2025. This transaction is not a related party transaction, and the promoter group has no interest in the entity being acquired. The acquisition is expected to be completed by September 30, 2026, subject to customary conditions.

announcements.subject: Coal India Ltd - 533278 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Coal India Limited (CIL) has approved a significant capital expenditure of Rs. 3,300 Crores to establish eight new coking coal washeries. These facilities are expected to be operational by FY 2030 and will collectively have a washing capacity of 21.5 Million Tonnes per Year (MT/Y). In addition to these new plants, CIL will invest Rs. 300 crore in renovating and modernizing its existing ten coking coal washeries, which currently have a capacity of 18.35 MT/Y. Five of the new washeries will be set up in Central Coalfields Limited, and three in Bharat Coking Coal Limited. This strategic expansion aims to improve the quality of domestic coking coal and reduce import dependency. CIL is also planning to monetize three older, non-operative coking coal washeries in line with the National Monetization Policy.

announcements.subject: Intelligent Supply Chain Infrastructure Trust - 544005 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Intelligent Supply Chain Infrastructure Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Intelligent Supply Chain Infrastructure Trust has announced a trading window closure effective from Wednesday, April 1, 2026. This measure is implemented in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Trust's internal policy. The trading window will be reopened 48 hours following the public declaration of the Trust's audited financial information for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date for the Board Meeting to approve these financial results will be communicated separately.

announcements.subject: Aditya Vision Ltd - 540205 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR (Opening Of Showroom)
announcements.detail: Opening of Showroom
announcements.ai_summary: Aditya Vision Limited has opened two new showrooms on March 27, 2026, as part of its expansion strategy. The first showroom, the company's 198th, is located at G.T. Road, Makrand Nagar, Kannauj-209726, Uttar Pradesh. The second showroom, marking the 199th outlet, is situated at Pharenda Road, Shastri Nagar, Jila Udyog Chauraha, Maharajganj-273303, Uttar Pradesh. This announcement is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Digital Fibre Infrastructure Trust - 543859 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Digital Fibre Infrastructure Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Digital Fibre Infrastructure Trust has announced a trading window closure from Wednesday, April 1, 2026. This closure is in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Trust's policy on Unpublished Price Sensitive Information. The trading window will re-open 48 hours after the public announcement of the Trust's audited financial information for the last quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider and approve these financial results will be intimated in due course.

announcements.subject: Cemindia Projects Ltd - 509496 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Approved the elevating Mr. Soumitra Ghosh, Vice President -Operations, in the category of Senior Management Personnel with effect from 02nd April, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Cemindia Projects Ltd, at their meeting held on March 27, 2026, approved the elevation of Mr. Soumitra Ghosh, Vice President - Operations, to the category of Senior Management Personnel. This elevation is effective from April 02, 2026, and is intended to enhance his contribution to the company's growth and operational excellence. Mr. Ghosh holds a Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering and has over 28 years of experience in project management, having been associated with the company since 2003. His performance will be reviewed during annual appraisals.

announcements.subject: INTERISE TRUST - 541300 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: INTERISE TRUST has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: The Chief Financial Officer of Interise Investment Managers Private Limited, acting as the Investment Manager to Interise Trust, has certified that proceeds from the issue of Commercial Papers (CPs) were used for disclosed purposes and listing conditions were adhered to. The Commercial Papers were issued on February 17, 2026, with a face value of Rs. 5,00,000/- and an issue price of Rs. 4,95,961/-, yielding 7.25% p.a. A total of 1,714 CPs were issued, maturing on March 30, 2026. This certification is in compliance with SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-PoD/P/CIR/2025/0000000137 dated October 15, 2025.

announcements.subject: Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd - 544250 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Earnings Call Transcript
announcements.detail: The transcript of the Institutional Investor Meet held on Tuesday, 24th March 2026 is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Limited has provided the transcript of its Institutional Investor Meet held on Tuesday, March 24, 2026. The transcript has been uploaded on the company's website and will also be available on the websites of BSE and NSE. The meeting included presentations by Mr. Himanshu Bakshi, Managing Director, and Mr. Richard D'Souza, Chief Financial Officer, covering business updates and strategic priorities. A question-and-answer session of approximately 30 minutes was also conducted.

announcements.subject: Biocon Ltd - 532523 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release
announcements.ai_summary: Biocon Limited has announced the appointment of Shreehas Tambe as its Chief Executive Officer & Managing Director, effective April 1, 2026. This appointment follows approvals from the Nomination & Remuneration Committee and the Board of Directors. Mr. Tambe will lead the integrated Biocon, encompassing biosimilars and generics, to enhance its global competitiveness. Kedar Upadhye has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer. This leadership transition is part of the full integration of Biocon Biologics Limited as a wholly owned subsidiary, creating a unified corporate structure. Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw highlighted Mr. Tambe's role in strategic milestones, including the Viatris biosimilars business acquisition, and noted that under his leadership, Biocon Biologics became one of the world's top five biosimilar companies with a valuation of USD 5.5 billion.

announcements.subject: Sattrix Information Security Ltd - 544189 - Business Update
announcements.detail: Business Update
announcements.ai_summary: Sattrix Information Security Limited has been awarded a contract by a leading Global Telecommunication Company in India. The order is for the supply of Product License Services for a duration of one year. The total value of this domestic contract is Rs. 13,42,00,000 (Thirteen Crore Forty-Two Lakh), exclusive of applicable taxes. The execution period for this order is also one year. This contract is not considered a related party transaction.
